nodes.name: sciona.pronto.state_estimator
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.critic_notes: Converted from a flat pronto module so metadata backfills resolve the family namespace correctly.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Package-shaped family layout for a singleton atom.

nodes.name: update_state_estimate
nodes.description: Fuse a measurement into the RBIS state using an EKF-style linear update.
nodes.type_signature: (prior_state: np.ndarray, prior_cov: np.ndarray, measurement: np.ndarray, utime: int) -> np.ndarray
nodes.conceptual_summary: Linear measurement-update step that fuses a measurement into the prior state with a Kalman-style gain computed from the covariance and fixed measurement noise.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
